tools.name: schedule_task
tools.description: Register a persistent cron schedule that runs even when your agent session ends. Specify a URL to call, how often, and for how long.

tools.name: check_schedule
tools.description: Check the status of a cron schedule — is it active, when does it next run, how many times has it executed?

tools.name: cancel_schedule
tools.description: Cancel an active cron schedule to stop all future executions immediately.

tools.name: get_execution_history
tools.description: View recent execution history for a schedule — status codes, response previews, and timing.
